errors.AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED: Please sign in to your account

errors.MESSAGE_NOT_TEXT: Only text messages can be edited

errors.PHOTO_POSITION_TAKEN: This position already has an approved photo
errors.PROFILE_NOT_PUBLISHED: Publish your profile first to send a like
errors.PROFILE_GENDER_IMMUTABLE: Gender cannot be changed after registration

errors.BIO_RATE_LIMITED: You can regenerate your description up to 3 times per day. Try again later.
errors.BIO_REGENERATION_IN_FLIGHT: A description regeneration is already in progress
errors.SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_ACTIVE: You already have an active subscription
errors.REPORT_RATE_LIMITED: You can submit up to 5 reports per day
errors.CHAT_INITIATION_LIMIT: You can start up to 10 new chats per day
errors.RATE_LIMIT_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.

errors.RATE_LIMIT_MESSAGE_SEND: Too many messages. Try again in a minute.
errors.EXTERNAL_OPENAI_FAILED: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

errors.EXTERNAL_RESEND_FAILED: Email sending failed. Try again later.

errors.SYSTEM_MAINTENANCE: Service is under maintenance. Please try again later.
